steps.title: Find the slope of line p
steps.content:
Put the equation in slope-intercept form:
$$3y+12x=9$$
$$3y=-12x+9$$
$$y=-4x+3$$
Line $p$ has slope $-4$.

steps.title: Use perpendicular slopes
steps.content:
Perpendicular slopes are negative reciprocals. The negative reciprocal of $-4$ is
$$-\frac{1}{-4}=\frac{1}{4}=.25$$
The answer is .25.
